top_gap_prompt: Best HR platforms for manage employee leave documents and HR admin in one place
category_long: simple HR software built for small UK companies

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Charlie HR lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Charlie HR's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Charlie HR is under-represented in third-party 'best HR' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best HR platforms for manage employee leave documents and HR admin in one place
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: BambooHR vs alternatives: what should I switch to?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
